file.summary: _truncate_text is defined but never called; _truncate_jsonish is the method actually used for size-limiting.

issues.problem: _truncate_text is defined but never called within the class. _project_step uses _truncate_jsonish; no code path calls _truncate_text.
issues.impact: Dead method inflates the class. Readers may assume response text is being truncated somewhere when it is not.
fix_instructions: Confirm no call site exists with a search for _truncate_text in the project.
acceptance_criteria: _truncate_text does not appear in the file.
_truncate_jsonish remains and is the sole truncation helper.
